home.tagline: Emergency readiness first. Self-sufficiency for life.
home.hero_title: Build your readiness. Live more self-sufficiently.
home.hero_sub: Take the quizzes, get a personalised plan, and join a global movement of people preparing for the next decade with clear eyes.
marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.intro: Emergency readiness and self-sufficiency gear and products curated for practical resilience.
communities.title: The future of self-sufficient living. Built together.
communities.intro: Autarkeia is building a global network of self-sufficient communities — where people grow their own food, generate their own energy, build their own homes, and live free from dependence on fragile systems.
library.title: Global Resilience Library
library.intro: A comprehensive emergency readiness and self-sufficiency library with open access for Pro members.

plans.sub: Two simple tiers: Free and Pro (€7/month).
